lens: if this breaks in production, can someone diagnose it from logs, metrics, and traces alone — judge telemetry sufficiency and that nothing sensitive leaks
note: The labeled held-out set is one JSON object per line at held_out_path: {"input_code": <str>, "gold_band": [lo, hi]}. The harness, driver, scorer, and golden suite all read it verbatim. held_out_path matches judge/code-review/observability/metric.json exactly. SWAP held_out.jsonl to plug in more labeled examples; ids are assigned by surviving-line order (OB-001, OB-002, ...).
